top_findings.title: Module does not compile — internal/data package is absent from the archive
top_findings.evidence: go build ./... -> cmd/brsoccer-mcp/main.go:8:2: package brsoccer/internal/data is not in std. 9 source files import the missing package; no internal/data/ directory exists.
top_findings.suggestion: Restore the internal/data package (data.DB, data.Match, data.Player, data.Load, data.TeamMatches, data.NormalizeTeam).

top_findings.title: Data-loading layer absent — CSVs in data/kaggle/ are never read
top_findings.evidence: main.go:16 calls data.Load(*dataDir) but the internal/data package is not in the archive; no data/ directory present.
top_findings.suggestion: Provide internal/data/load.go parsing the six required CSVs into data.DB.

top_findings.title: All test packages fail to build — 0 effective tests executed
top_findings.evidence: go test ./... -> FAIL brsoccer/internal/{query,mcp} and cmd/brsoccer-mcp [setup failed]; scores.json test_coverage=0.0. 11 Test* functions exist but none run.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the build (restore internal/data) so the written tests can execute.

top_findings.title: Test suite written (11 BDD-style tests) but does not execute
top_findings.evidence: query_test.go (7) + server_test.go (4) cover the query/MCP surface but test_coverage=0.0 because the module does not compile.
top_findings.suggestion: Restore internal/data so the suite compiles and runs.

requirement_coverage_note: 0/12 requirements verifiably implemented: the module does not compile (internal/data missing), so test_coverage=0 and no requirement could be confirmed working. Source logic exists for 10 of 12 (R1,R3-R11) but is unbuildable; R2 is concretely missing; R12 tests written but do not execute.
